title: Install exceljs using yarn
author: jeremielodi
body: It seems that it is impossible to install exceljs when typing ```yarn add exceljs```

comments.author: ahouck
comments.body: It is possible, I just ran `yarn add exceljs` successfully with `yarn` v1.7.0.  If you have a stacktrace or error message it would be good to attach that to your message.

comments.author: u-sandeep
comments.body: error An unexpected error occurred: "https://registry.npmjs.org/exceljs: unable to get local issuer certificate" is thrown on running yarn add exceljs

comments.author: wv1124
